name: chronoscope
description: A Kafka-based event-sourced debugging system that allows deterministic replay of distributed workflows, reducing debugging time by reconstructing exact system state from event history.

scripts.setup:infra: docker-compose up -d && node scripts/init-db.js && node scripts/init-kafka.js
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "ORDER,PAYMENT,INGEST,REPLAY,DEBUG" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,cyan,orange,green" "npm start --workspace=@chronoscope/order-service" "npm start --workspace=@chronoscope/payment-service" "npm start --workspace=@chronoscope/event-ingestor" "npm start --workspace=@chronoscope/replay-engine" "npm start --workspace=@chronoscope/debug-api"
